projects.subtitle: Cloud Computing
projects.title: VMware
projects.description: The is a deck to pitch the cloud computing virtualization software VMware. This deck explained the specifics of cloud computing. Our team pitched the idea to imaginary investors in the pass to learn entrepreneur skills.

projects.subtitle: Sustainability
projects.title: Terrawalls Pitch Deck
projects.description: This is a self-developed idea deck to revolutionize construction materials for residential houses. This wall utilized terra bricks to decrease construction cost, improve landscaping quality, and bring organic veggies striaght to your home.

projects.subtitle: Virtual Reality
projects.title: Surgical VR System Deck
projects.description: This is a presentation deck to pitch a developing patent that can improve the safety and efficiency of surgical practices. This VR system can allow the surgeon to view the patient from different angles, cast a pre-clinical screening on the patient and provide real-time help from other experts.

projects.detailTitle: Stress Management App - Born This Way Foundation
projects.categoryLabel: Mental Illness, App Development, Born This Way Foundation
projects.subtitle: Mental Illness Awareness
projects.title: Stress Management App
projects.description: This is a recommendation deck for the Born This Way Foundation to further their online presentence and spread awareness of mental illnesses and treating options. This recommendation is to develop an app that will allow teens to track their mood and plan their tasks in school and life to effectively decrease their stress level to the minimum.

projects.categoryLabel: Education, Water Scarcity, Quality of Life
projects.subtitle: Water Scarcity & Education
projects.title: Water Filtration System
projects.description: This is a recommendation deck for the Kidogo Foundation to expand the size of the early child education centers in the Nairobi slum in Kenya. The recommendation involves the distribution of a water filtration system which can improve the quality of life and act as a fundraiser for the Kidogo Foundation.

projects.subtitle: X-Prize Challenge
projects.title: Rainforest Biodiversity
projects.description: This is a self-made presentation deck that overviews the biodiversity problem in the rainforests. This is a part of the X-Prize Rainforest Challenge understanding project.

projects.subtitle: X-Prize Challenge
projects.title: Biodiversity Monitoring Solution
projects.description: This is the final pitch deck for the X-Prize Rainforest challenge. The idea pitched is to use a biomimicry robot with convolutional neural network to monitor the biodiversity of Magnoliophyte (plants).

projects.subtitle: Entrepreneurship & Sustainability
projects.title: Faunas One-Pager
projects.description: This is a one-pager introducing the company I co-founded, Faunas.

projects.categoryLabel: Renewable Energy, Wind Technology, Programmable Materials
projects.subtitle: Wind Technology & Programmable Material
projects.title: Programmable Wind Technology
projects.description: Did you know that wind turbines require electricity inputs to run properly? This article is proposing one of my idea to use programmable SMP materials on wind turbines to make a fully green wind technology.

projects.subtitle: Renewable Energy
projects.title: What is a Fuel Cell?
projects.description: What is a fuel cell? Is it possible to use gases to produce electricity? This article is going to give you the basics of fuel cell technology along with the in dept knowledge on some of the applications and technology details.

projects.detailTitle: Peter Thiel: How to build a Monopoly from 0 to 1
projects.subtitle: Entrepreneurship
projects.title: Peter Thiel: How to build a Monopoly from 0 to 1
projects.description: “Every moment in business happens only once. The next Bill Gates will not start an operating system. The next Larry Page won’t make a search engine. And the next Mark Zuckerberg won’t create a social network. If you are copying these guys, you aren’t learning from them.” In this article, you will learn more about how to get a business from 0 to 1 to a monopoly.

projects.subtitle: Solar Energy
projects.title: Decarbonization Experiment
projects.description: Have you ever heard of the term “Duck Curve”? Well, if you have some knowledge in the solar industry, you should be pretty familiar with this word. In this article, I will tell you what is a Duck Curve and how it relates to a CRAZY experiment conducted by Stanford University!

projects.subtitle: Renewable Energy
projects.title: Nuclear Fusion: Bottling A Star 🌟
projects.description: “Why can’t we catch and bottle a star?” The answer is we actually can. Just to clarify, we are not catching a star from space and seal it in a bottle. What we as a human race is trying to do is to build something that has the same mechanism of producing energy as the stars and put it in a device to maintain and control it. That sounds CRAZY! But, how does it work?

projects.categoryLabel: Renewable Energy, Nuclear Energy, Tidal Energy, Hydrogen Gas
projects.subtitle: Renewable Energy
projects.title: Alternative Energy: What’s next?
projects.description: Do you know that the Earth you have known since when you were born is heating itself to extinction? Do you know that arctic sea ice is now declining at a rate of 12.85 percent per decade? What can we do about it as human? Well, we can use alternative energy.

projects.categoryLabel: Renewable Energy, Wind Technology, Programmable Materials
projects.subtitle: Idea
projects.title: Programmable Wind Idea Pitch
projects.description: This video explains my idea of integrating programmable materials on wind turbines to achieve a zero-input green energy source. You will learn about renewable energies and shape memory polymers together with how this idea could be implemented in real life.

projects.detailTitle: The Secrets of Fuel Cell Technology
projects.subtitle: Renewable Energy
projects.title: The Secrets of Fuel Cell Technology
projects.description: This video will allow you to understand what is fuel cell technology. Where it can be used, how can I be implemented, and How does it work. After the video, you can talk to anyone about this new knowledge and expand your knowledge base.

projects.subtitle: Waste Reducing
projects.title: Opening a startup at 15
projects.description: This video is a full introduction to my new company Faunas. We aim to create a ZERO waste society where all waste can be used as raw materials. Please check us out!

projects.categoryLabel: Renewable Energy, Nuclear Fusion, Public Speaking
projects.subtitle: Renewable Energy
projects.title: Nuclear Fusion Presentation
projects.description: This presentation is the first presentation I have ever given in front on a whole audience. I explained the basics of nuclear fusion and its potential side effects. This is when I got into nuclear fusion research, hope you like it!

projects.detailTitle: Internet of Things Application in Retail Presentation
projects.categoryLabel: Internet of Things, Retail, Online Shopping, Public Speaking
projects.subtitle: Online Shopping
projects.title: Internet of Things Application in Retail Presentation
projects.description: The is a final pitch of a hack-a-ton or fast-past brainstorming and implementation. The idea pitched in a smart tailor where online customers would be able to fit themselves for online shopping. This tailor would have sensors working together to capture the correct size of the customer for precision.

projects.detailTitle: City Scale Decarbonization and Duck Curve Explained
projects.categoryLabel: Renewable Energy, Solar Energy, Duck Curve, Stanford University
projects.subtitle: Solar Energy
projects.title: City Scale Decarbonization and Duck Curve Explained
projects.description: This is the explanation video of the city scale decarbonization experiment conducted by Stanford. This experiment took advantage of the duck curve created by the solar energy to heat and cool the campus with minimal carbon dioxide produced.
